pi_items.source: Task setup script (setup_task.sh) copies the sample data to this path, and the task prompt instructs the user to save it here. The verifier script relies on this file path via export_result.sh.
The task prompt requests editing 'dive #2'. Download and analysis of SampleDivesV2.ssrf confirms a dive with number='2' exists.
The task prompt explicitly asks the user to change O2 (Oxygen) to 21%.
The task prompt explicitly asks the user to change He (Helium) to 35%.
The verifier.py implementation uses this 1.0% tolerance when asserting the correct percentage value was set. No contradictory evidence was found.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real, non-synthetic dive data (SampleDivesV2.ssrf from the official Subsurface repo). The user is required to edit dive #2 and change its first cylinder gas mix to Trimix 21/35 (21% O2 and 35% He) and save the file back to /home/ga/Documents/dives.ssrf. The verifier enforces these percentages within a 1.0% tolerance.
